segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic-style classroom interior with high vaulted ceilings and stone walls. Several students in dark robes sit at wooden benches reading and writing, while natural light filters through tall arched windows. An ornate wooden door stands at the far end of the hall beneath decorative stonework.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a gothic-style classroom that emphasizes the solemnity and scale of a historic stone hall. It begins by capturing the vastness of the interior, where high vaulted ceilings and heavy stone walls frame the scholarly environment. As the eye moves across the room, the focus settles on students in dark robes diligently reading and writing at long wooden benches. Natural light filters through tall arched windows to illuminate the dust in the air before the perspective draws toward an ornate wooden door positioned beneath decorative stonework at the far end of the hall.
